channel.title: INsmh
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INsmh, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hawks plan a Magic City tribute night with lemon pepper wings, T.I. and merch
Snake Sneaks Onto Plane And Delays A Flight In Australia
item.description: The 2-foot green tree snake was found Tuesday in the plane's cargo hold as passengers were boarding a Virgin Australia flight in Melbourne.

item.title: Injured mother manatee and calf are rescued in Florida and taken to SeaWorld
Fmr. Manager of DOD Aerospace Threat Program: “UFOs are Real”
item.description: Something extraordinary was revealed today. Former high-level officials and scientists with deep black experience who have

item.title: Blaring horn after a power surge delays Pistons and Cavaliers in 3rd quarter
Viral phenomenon in Argentina has young people identifying themselves as animals
Heroic Chihuahua Helps Swiss Rescuers Find Man Who Fell Into Glacier
item.description: The furry Chihuahua paced atop an Alpine rock after its owner fell into a crevasse, allowing rescuers to locate the man.

item.title: Sleepy owl found resting among items on a New York antique store shelf
10-Year-Old Boy Sues Father for Spending His Savings without His Consent
item.description: A Chinese man was taken to court by his 10-year-old son for spending the boy's savings without his consent and refusing to pay him back. The post 10-Y...

item.title: This Cliff-Hanging Café May Be the World’s Most Dangerous
item.description: Gushi Cliff Coffee, a café in southeastern China’s Fujian Province, allows patrons to enjoy a cup of coffee on the side of a cliff, 60 meters above ro...

item.title: The Unique Ant Species That Consists Only of Queens That Reproduce Without Males
item.description: Temnothorax kinomurai is a species of parasitic ants that lacks both workers and males, consisting exclusively of queens. The post The Unique Ant Spec...

item.title: Man Attacked by Dogs Unexpectedly Saved by Exploding Phone in His Pocket
item.description: A Brazilian man savagely attacked by two large dogs claims he is only alive thanks to the explosion of his phone in his pocket. Having your phone expl...

item.title: This 55-Meter Steam Train Is the World’s Longest Chocolate Sculpture
item.description: A Maltese chocolatier and his team spent around four months piecing together the world's longest chocolate sculpture - a 55.27-meter-long train. The p...

item.title: New dinosaur from 95,000,000 years ago may have been ‘first dragon’
item.description: Spinosaurus mirabilis could have been mistaken for something out of Game of Thrones

item.title: Trump ordering release of secret alien files ‘could be distraction from controversies’
item.description: 'The timing is fascinating and raises questions,' a UFO expert said.

item.title: Man who looks like Jeffrey Epstein says his life is a misery
Saudi Arabia’s ‘oldest man’ dies at the dubious age of 142
item.description: He is older than the Statue of Liberty

item.title: 7 creepy facts about the human body you didn’t learn in school
